---
name: Ambiguity / question (Manual Markdown)
about: Track an unresolved design, behavior, or terminology question using the classic markdown template flow.
title: "Ambiguity: <short summary>"
labels: "implementation-issue, issue-type: ambiguity-question"
---

## Template Content

### Summary

Short statement of the ambiguity or open question.

### Created phase

Phase N

### Source

Checklist step, review, workflow, or developer source.

### Scheduled target

Target phase or leave blank if still undecided.

### Priority

Low | Medium | High | Critical

### Notes

Optional clarifying context.

### Rationale and context

Explain the ambiguity, competing interpretations, or unresolved design question.

### Impact

Describe how the ambiguity affects implementation, review, or later phases.

### Implementation notes

Capture candidate approaches, constraints, or follow-up investigation notes.

### Acceptance / closing criteria

Describe what decision, clarification, or implementation outcome would resolve this.
